key_lessons: YOU (real squad) leads through GW30: stable Haaland captaincy + strong mid-block beats both baselines.
GEMINI template (always-Haaland C, proven-pts core) stays close; safe captaincy avoids big misses.
CLAUDE APEX drifted into low-floor differentials (Garner/Summerville) via blind-form transfers, hurting captain EV and floor.
strategy_flaws: Blind form over-rewards recent differential hauls with low minutes-reliability.
Transfer counterfactuals show several 'ไม่เปลี่ยนดีกว่า' cases (GW23, GW25, GW29) where holding was better.
CLAUDE needs a premium-captain floor and ownership-aware filter to match template safety.
